caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain dark background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved top with red floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. In the early part of the sequence, she begins to raise her hands outward. As the scene progresses, she opens her palms wider and moves her hands further apart to emphasize her point, while her mouth remains open as she continues to speak. A small, circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the frames. The lighting remains consistent throughout, focusing on the woman while the background remains a solid, dark void.
